_comment: Course tools/software registry (added 2026-07-24, mirrors textbooks.json/sources.json's schema and honesty rule). Each url is the vendor's own official product or homepage. mathworks.com (MATLAB, Simulink), fchartsoftware.com/ees, mastercam.com, minitab.com, and python.org were live-fetched and confirmed reachable at authoring time. Autodesk (AutoCAD, Fusion 360), ANSYS (Mechanical, Fluent, Granta EduPack), Dassault (SolidWorks), and Analog Devices (LTspice) returned bot-protection blocks (403/timeout) to automated fetch, not evidence of an incorrect URL — these are the current, long-stable product URLs for well-known commercial products; re-verify manually if a vendor restructures its site. 'courses' is populated only for courses already at full teaching depth; a course absent from 'courses' has no tools listed yet and the renderer must show an honest 'in production' placeholder, not an error — same convention as career blocks and the reference extractor.

matlab.name: MATLAB
matlab.note: Free student-priced license at most universities; the standard numerical/matrix computing environment for engineering coursework.

simulink.name: Simulink
simulink.note: Block-diagram simulation on top of MATLAB — circuits, controls, and dynamic systems without writing code.

python.name: Python (NumPy / SciPy / Jupyter)
python.note: Free and open source; NumPy/SciPy/Matplotlib cover the same numerical ground as MATLAB at zero license cost.

autocad.name: AutoCAD
autocad.note: 2D/3D drafting standard; free for verified students via Autodesk's education plan.

solidworks.name: SolidWorks
solidworks.note: Parametric 3D mechanical design; the CSWA/CSWP certifications are recognized industry-wide.

fusion360.name: Fusion 360
fusion360.note: CAD, CAM, and basic simulation in one package; free education license.

ansys-mechanical.name: ANSYS Mechanical
ansys-mechanical.note: The standard structural finite-element analysis package — stress, fatigue, and vibration simulation.

ansys-fluent.name: ANSYS Fluent
ansys-fluent.note: The standard CFD package for fluid flow and convective/conductive heat-transfer simulation.

granta-edupack.name: Granta EduPack
granta-edupack.note: The standard materials-selection and Ashby-chart teaching tool used across materials science courses.

ees.name: EES (Engineering Equation Solver)
ees.note: Built-in thermodynamic and transport property tables — the standard tool for cycle and heat-transfer coursework.

ltspice.name: LTspice
ltspice.note: Free SPICE circuit simulator — the de facto standard for student and professional circuit analysis alike.

mastercam.name: Mastercam
mastercam.note: The most widely installed CAM package for generating CNC toolpaths from a 3D model.

minitab.name: Minitab
minitab.note: The standard statistical software in industrial quality and Six Sigma programs.
